feature: Photo to Comic P1.5-D: Observability Dashboard (Comic Health Section)
summary: All P1.5-D Comic Health Dashboard features verified working: GET /api/admin/metrics/comic-health returns all metric categories (jobs, performance, consistency, quality_check, downloads, conversion, alerts), critical alert shows when success rate < 80% (currently 54.5%), admin authentication required, days parameter works. Frontend Comic Health tab renders all sections with real data from MongoDB. All regression tests pass.

tests.name: Comic health returns all metric categories (jobs, performance, consistency, quality_check, downloads, conversion, alerts)
Comic health returns critical alert when success rate < 80%
Comic health requires admin authentication (rejects regular users)
Comic health rejects unauthenticated requests
Comic health accepts days parameter (7, 30, 90)
Comic health handles empty state gracefully
Quality check endpoint regression test
Events endpoint regression test
Job status endpoint regression test
PDF endpoint regression test
Consistency logs reflected in comic health metrics
Admin summary endpoint regression test
Admin reliability endpoint regression test
Admin login works
Admin dashboard loads at /app/admin
Comic Health tab visible and clickable
Comic Health section renders with data-testid='comic-health-section'
Job Success metrics render (Total Jobs: 22, Completed: 12, Failed: 10, Success Rate: 54.5%)
Performance metrics render (Avg Gen Time: 32.4s, Retry Rate: 0%)
Character Consistency section renders (empty - validator just launched)
Quality Checks section renders (Total: 5, Good: 2, Poor: 3)
Downloads section renders (PDF Attempts: 2, PDF Success: 100%)
Conversion funnel renders (Style Clicks: 6, Generate After Preview: 4, Result Views: 5)
Alert banner shows for low success rate (54.5% < 80%)
Photo to Comic page loads at /app/photo-to-comic
StylePreviewStrip component visible (regression)
Upload zone visible (regression)
Credits display visible (regression)

test_credentials: Admin: admin@creatorstudio.ai / Cr3@t0rStud!o#2026, Test User: test@visionary-suite.com / Test@2026#
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1.5-D Comic Health Dashboard fully tested. Comic Health tab is the last tab in admin dashboard (data-testid='section-comic_health'). Comic Health section (data-testid='comic-health-section') shows real data from MongoDB: 22 jobs, 54.5% success rate, 32.4s avg gen time. Consistency metrics are empty because validator (P1.5-C) just launched and no jobs have run through it yet. Alert banner correctly shows when success rate < 80%. All metric cards have data-testid attributes (comic-total-jobs, comic-success-rate, comic-avg-time, etc.).
